rationale: Diff only contains execution evidence (manifest.json + result.json) under .ddx/executions/. No changes to execute_bead_loop.go, tests, or docs are visible, so none of the 7 acceptance criteria can be evaluated as implemented.

findings.summary: No code changes to cli/internal/agent/execute_bead_loop.go in this diff — AC1 (move attempted[] after pre-claim hook) cannot be verified.
No regression tests added for pre-claim hook retry or store-error continuation paths — AC1, AC3 unverifiable.
No conversion of post-Execute Store.* error returns into log+event+cooldown+continue — AC2 unverifiable.
No integration test seeding 3 ready beads with mixed outcomes — AC4 unverifiable.
No documentation update describing loop-termination conditions — AC6 unmet.
No README change retiring the 'restart if ddx work exits early' guidance — AC7 unmet.
Diff shows only execution evidence artifacts; the merge commit d57f1ddf referenced in result.json may carry the actual fix, but the supplied diff for review does not include it.
